transcript: Speaker A: ಏನ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದೀಯಾ? [What are you doing?] Speaker B: ಆಯ್, sleeping. 'I am sleeping' ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು. ಸ್ವಲ್ಪ formal ಆಗಿ 'I am getting some sleep' ಅಂತ ಕೂಡ ಹೇಳ್ಬಹುದು. [Hi, sleeping. You should say 'I am sleeping'. Formally, you can also say 'I am getting some sleep'.] Speaker A: ಓ ಹೌದಾ, ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಹೇಗೆ ಕಲಿಬೇಕು? [Oh really, how to learn English?] Speaker B: ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಪ್ರತಿದಿನ 15 minutes daily practice ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ ಸಾಕು, 1 ತಿಂಗಳಿನಲ್ಲಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಯಬಹುದು. [Just practice with me for 15 minutes daily, you can learn English in 1 month.] Speaker A: ಇದಕ್ಕೆ ತುಂಬಾ ಖರ್ಚು ಆಗುತ್ತಾ? ನನ್ನ ಹತ್ರ ಅಷ್ಟು ದುಡ್ಡಿಲ್ಲ. [Will this cost a lot? I don't have that much money.] Speaker B: ಕೇವಲ 1 Rupee ಗೆ ಈ app ಸಂಪೂರ್ಣವಾಗಿ try ಮಾಡಬಹುದು. 50 ಲಕ್ಷಕ್ಕಿಂತ ಹೆಚ್ಚು ಜನ ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿತಿದ್ದಾರೆ. [You can try this app completely for just 1 Rupee. More than 50 lakh people have learned English with me.] Speaker A: ಸೂಪರ್! ಹೇಗೆ ಜಾಯಿನ್ ಆಗೋದು? [Super! How to join?] Speaker B: ಈಗಲೇ MySivi app ಡೌನ್ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಯೋದನ್ನ ಶುರು ಮಾಡು. [Download the MySivi app now and start learning English.] Speaker C: Click on install now and download MySivi app.
on_screen_text: ಏನ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದೀಯಾ? [What are you doing?], sleeping, I am sleeping, I am getting some sleep, 15 MINUTES, 1 Month, English ಕಲಿಯಬಹುದು [Can learn English], ಖರ್ಚು ಆಗುತ್ತಾ? [Will it cost?], 1 Rupee Only, 50 LAKHS, MySivi AI English Speaking App, MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: The ad features a split-screen conversation between a sleeping woman and an AI avatar, demonstrating how the MySivi app helps users learn English through daily 15-minute practice sessions. The avatar explains that the app is highly affordable, costing only 1 Rupee to try, and has over 50 lakh users. The ad concludes with a call to action to download the MySivi app from the Play Store.
